suite.name: Restoration-Acceptance-Form
suite.source: C:\Users\zamic\Documents\INTERN\Robot Framework\Robot Framework TMFORCE Mobile\Test Case For Video\Restoration-Acceptance-Form.robot

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.1/cli/args/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | no | alias | | strict_ssl | No | allows you to send commands to an invalid certificate host like a self-signed one. |

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` appears on current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given `text` into text field identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Hide Keyboard
kw.doc: Hides the software keyboard on the device. (optional) In iOS, use `key_name` to press a particular key, ex. `Done`. In Android, no parameters are used.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` appears on current page.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.doc: Types the given password into text field identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Hide Keyboard
kw.doc: Hides the software keyboard on the device. (optional) In iOS, use `key_name` to press a particular key, ex. `Done`. In Android, no parameters are used.

kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Get Element Attribute
kw.msg: Element 'xpath= //*[contains(@content-desc, 'Activity Id')]' attribute 'content-desc' value 'Activity Id A-0000008905'
kw.doc: Get element attribute using given attribute: name, value,...

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Raw Text Captured: Activity Id A-0000008905
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Failed to extract a valid ID. Result was: ${CAPTURED_ACTIVITY_ID}
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Extracts the ID even if "Activity Id" text comes first

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Get Webelement
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: ValueError: Element locator 'xpath= //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="RAF"]' did not match any elements.
kw.doc: Returns the first [http://selenium-python.readthedocs.io/api.html#module-selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement|WebElement] object matching ``locator``.
kw.status: ValueError: Element locator 'xpath= //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="RAF"]' did not match any elements.

kw.msg: ${element} = ('FAIL', 'ValueError: Element locator \'xpath= //android.widget.Button[@content-desc="RAF"]\' did not match any elements.')
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Swipe By Percent
kw.doc: Swipe from one percent of the screen to another percent, for an optional duration. Normal swipe fails to scale for different screen resolutions, this can be avoided using percent.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Hide Keyboard
kw.doc: Hides the software keyboard on the device. (optional) In iOS, use `key_name` to press a particular key, ex. `Done`. In Android, no parameters are used.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Press Keycode
kw.doc: Sends a press of keycode to the device.
